query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_expenses FROM expenses;
SELECT p.name, p.party, p.state, COUNT(e.id) as expense_count, SUM(CAST(e.amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_amount
FROM parliamentarians p
LEFT JOIN expenses e ON e.parliamentarian_id = p.id
WHERE p.source_camara = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.party, p.state
HAVING expense_count > 0
ORDER BY expense_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
